ab: ti sakinu a ngadan na ku kama.
ti kivi a ngadan na ku kina.
izua macidilj a ku kaka tjavulung a uqaljay, ti piya timadju, tapuluq sa ita anga cavilj nimadju.
ch: 我有一個哥哥，他叫piya，他今年11歲。
en: I have a brother, his name is piya, he is 11 years old.

ab: kitulutulu amen i tua mamaw a gakku.
ch: 我們在同一間學校讀書。
en: We study in the same school.

ab: tjengelay aken kati kaka tjavulung a uqaljay a semenay.
en: Both my brother and I like to sing.

ab: tjengelay aken a ljemangui nu kalja pulavayan maciur a men a tacemekeljan a vaik a ljemanguy.
ch: 我喜歡游泳，放假的時候，我們全家會一起去游泳。
en: I like swimming. During the holidays, our whole family go swimming together.

ab: tjengelay aken a kipuqali ta vaquan a qali, maqati amen a maciur a semenay katua ljemanguy.
ch: 我喜歡認識新朋友，我們可以一起唱歌和游泳。
en: I love meeting new people, we can sing and swim together.
